text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've come to a shrine with Fine Motion, who's
been feeling under the weather recently.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Mmm... A Japanese power spot! I can't help
getting my hopes up about this!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
After all, unusual events are known to occur at
shrines, aren't they? We might catch sight of
some fairies or messengers from the gods...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Even back in Ireland, people would
spot fairies and things at old churches and the
like... I've always wanted to see that sort of thing
with my own eyes!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And on top of that, sometimes the people who
witness those phenomena receive blessings! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Those spirits might even make me fighting fit
again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle... Rustle...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It came from over there! Let's investigate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Scrambling after Fine Motion, I run towards the
eerie sound...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crrrrk... Crrrrk... Ngh! Hrrrrgh! Creak!
Hnrghhh! PRINCESS PUUULLL!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Phew... Oh, hello, you two!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami! Um, isn't that the rope... usually
wrapped around sacred trees?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
That's right! It looked like it was getting a little
slack, so the chief priest asked me to tighten it
up!
choice_data_list: I never would've guessed that sound was you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise! ♪ So the fairy turned out to be
Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But you know, that looks very invigorating! Could
I help you out?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Right, then, let's get this rope nice and
tight!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami and Fine
text_block_list.text: One, two... PUUULLL!

text_block_list.name: Chief Priest
text_block_list.text:
Goodness! Thank you, all three of you. Ho ho ho,
I expect the gods themselves are just as pleased
as I am.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Gracious, the gods themselves? It's an honor to
have been of assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps due to divine providence, Fine Motion's
condition begins to noticeably improve in the
days after!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I accompany Fine Motion as she hurries towards
the eerie sound, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crrrrrk... Snap! Shnnnng...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Oh? The sound stopped. I wonder what happened...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hmmm... I have a bad feeling about this.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes the mischief fairies and yokai like to
engage in goes beyond simple pranks.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We can't have anything happening to you, can
we, Trainer? Let's head back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We make our way carefully back towards the
shrine, and Fine Motion's condition doesn't
improve at all...
